channel.title: It Change Management on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in It Change Management on simeononsecurity

item.title: IT Policies and Change Management: ITSM, ITIL, and CAB Explained
item.category: "it change management" , "ITIL change management" , "CAB change advisory board" , "ITSM practices" , "it policies for teams" , "change management process it" , "managing an it team" , "it career playbook"
item.description: Learn how to build IT policies and run effective change management processes using ITSM, ITIL 4, and Change Advisory Board (CAB) practices that reduce risk and downtime.

item.title: Managing an IT Team
item.category: "IT team management" , "IT manager" , "building IT team" , "IT change management" , "ITSM" , "ITIL" , "outsourcing IT" , "IT director" , "IT leadership"
item.description: How to build, lead, and scale an IT team — team structure, hiring, change management, ITSM practices, and the outsourcing vs. in-house decision.
